flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Hartwick College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (52.9% → 41.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Hartwick College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (46.2% vs 58.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hartwick College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.8k → $55.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hartwick College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.8k → $55.0k).
